description_long: This is a long, double-seat outdoor bench constructed primarily from dark brown wooden slats, supported by robust, dark green metal armrests and legs. The bench features a high, slightly reclined backrest and two armrests on each end, as well as a central divider, providing separation between the two seating areas. The wooden slats are arranged horizontally along the seat and backrest, giving the bench a classic park or street furniture appearance. The metal frame is smoothly contoured, with rounded armrests and legs that curve outward for stability. The bench is designed to comfortably seat multiple people and is likely heavy and durable, suitable for public spaces. Its overall style and materials suggest it is intended for outdoor use in parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas.
description: A double-seat outdoor bench with dark brown wooden slats and green metal armrests and legs, featuring a central divider and high backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length, two seating areas, central divider, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metal armrest, the depth of the seat, and the slatted backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden slats of the backrest and the sturdy metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and seat depth seen in view 1.
attribute_leg_design: curved metal supports with two main legs per seat
